message:
feat(polyfills): add RSA KeyObjects, Unix sockets, generatePrime, privateEncrypt

Phase 5 polyfill improvements for Node.js compatibility:

- Fix createPublicKey() to derive actual public key from Ed25519/X25519 private keys
- Add Unix domain socket support (socketCreateUnix, socketConnectUnix, socketBindUnix)
- Support {path: '/tmp/socket'} option in net.connect() and server.listen()
- Return proper KeyObjects from generateKeyPairSync() for RSA and EC keys
- Add P-384 curve support with proper KeyObject structure
- Implement generatePrime/generatePrimeSync and checkPrime/checkPrimeSync
- Implement privateEncrypt and publicDecrypt (PKCS#1 v1.5 type 1 padding)
